```python
def shortest_palindrome(s):
    if len(s) == 0:
        return ""
    
    # Create a combined string: s + '#' + reversed(s)
    combined = s + '#' + s[::-1]
    
    # Compute LPS (Longest Prefix Suffix) array
    lps = [0] * len(combined)
    for i in range(1, len(combined)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and combined[i] != combined[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if combined[i] == combined[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    # The length of the longest suffix which is also a prefix
    lps_value = lps[-1]
    
    # Construct the shortest palindrome
    return s[:len(s) - lps_value] + s[::-1][lps_value:]

# Read input and output result
import sys
s = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
print(shortest_palindrome(s))
```
